utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Hey !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Hi !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Listen , can we watch cartoons on your television ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: We need a porn break .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: We spent the last two hours watching In & Out & In , Again .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Well , so , why do not you just turn it off ?

emotion_cause.span: 6_why do not you just turn it off ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Because then we would be the guys who turned off free porn .

emotion_cause.span: 7_Because then we would be the guys who turned off free porn .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Ooh , good , you are here ! Okay .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Hey !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Hi !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Well , what ... what cha got there ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh this , well I am glad you asked .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Now , do not you hate it when you have to cut a tin can with an ordinary steak knife ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Ahh !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Now , I know what you are thinking .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Pregnant Woman Slays Four ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Phoebe , they did not make you pay for those knives , did they ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: No !

emotion_cause.span: 17_they did not make you pay for those knives , did they ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Honey , you are not gonna make enough money to help Frank and Alice just by selling knives .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: No ... no , I know that , but I just have to make enough money for the second part of my plan .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: What the second part of your plan ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: My Saturn dealership .
